name: project-launcher
title: Project Launcher
description: Open project paths with your configured apps.
author: Perry

commands.name: open-path
commands.title: Open Path
commands.description: Search saved paths and recent launches, then open with a configured app.

commands.name: manage-paths
commands.title: Manage Paths
commands.description: Add, edit, and remove saved project paths.

commands.name: manage-apps
commands.title: Manage Apps
commands.description: Configure the apps available in the launcher.
